title: Epic Games presents Unreal Engine 6 and 5.8 with Lumen Lite, AI integration, and Fortnite skin sharing
summary: The new generation of the graphics engine allows developers to leverage artificial intelligence tools, dynamic lighting, and asset interoperability between games.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops 2 Coming to PS4 and PS5 with Official Ports
summary: Activision and Treyarch announce enhanced versions of the two classic shooter games for Sony consoles.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 Gets Free Content Inspired by Brand New Day, with New Suit and Trailer
summary: The game adds the 'Fresh Start Suit' and a trailer that shows Hulk and sets the stage for the movie.

title: GTA 5 Will Be Free for PS4 and Xbox One Owners Who Upgrade to PS5 and Xbox Series
summary: Rockstar offers the enhanced version of the game for free starting June 18, including graphical and performance improvements.

title: Former PlayStation Executive Criticizes Xbox Strategy for 'Basic Misunderstanding' of the Industry
summary: Shawn Layden believes that Microsoft's recent moves show a lack of understanding of how the video game industry works.

title: British Court Allows Former Rockstar Employees to Sue for Union Retaliation
summary: The court rules against the GTA 6 developer by admitting all accusations from the dismissed workers, including blacklisting.

title: Microsoft Closed Ninja Theory and Allegedly Already Planned to Do So Before Announcing Its New Game
summary: According to multiple reports, the company had already decided to close the studio when it showed Senua at Summer Game Fest, looking for a buyer.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales Receives Positive Reviews for Its Emotional Story
summary: The RPG pays homage to the classics of the Japanese genre and offers a narrative experience that has won over the specialized press.

title: Pokémon Champions Launches on Mobile with a Powerful Gift and Mystery Codes
summary: The Pokémon battle game comes to mobile devices offering players exclusive rewards and special events.

title: Guild Wars 3 Announces Monetization Model Without Pay-to-Win or Mandatory Subscription
summary: The developers detail that the game will not have monthly fees or pay-to-win elements, differentiating itself from other MMOs.

title: Dispatch Releases 'HR Violations' Patch That Removes Censorship on Switch 2 and Switch
summary: The studio addresses player complaints by releasing a free pack that restores previously censored content on Nintendo.

title: Warframe Expands Jade Shadows Mission with Constellations, New Relics and Improvements
summary: The 'Constellations' update adds content to one of the game's most impactful missions, including new mods and items.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Gets Its Final Update with a Story That Connects to Black Flag Resynced
summary: The game adds a new story arc that serves as a direct link to the next title in Ubisoft's pirate series.

title: Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles Adds New Game+ Mode 29 Years Later
summary: The enhanced version of the classic tactical game adds the option to restart the adventure while retaining all skills and items.

title: Vampire Survivors Rethinks Its Collaboration with Fortnite Due to Epic's Use of Generative AI
summary: The studio investigates a possible withdrawal from the agreement following Epic Games' recent announcements about generative artificial intelligence.

title: Stop Killing Games Suffers Setback in European Parliament but the Fight Continues
summary: The initiative to preserve games as a service after their closure did not achieve the expected support in the hearing, but the movement remains active.

title: PS5-Compatible SSD Prices Skyrocket, Costing More Than the Console
summary: Both official SanDisk drives and other market options reach exorbitant prices to expand PS5 storage.

title: New Game from Yakuza Creator, Gang of Dragon, Loses Director and Funding
summary: NetEase withdraws its support and the director leaves the project, leaving the future of the spiritual successor to Yakuza up in the air.

title: Dave the Diver Releases a Live-Action Short Film and Prepares the 'In the Jungle' DLC
summary: The studio responsible for Sharknado produces a cinematic promotional while the anticipated downloadable content approaches its release.

title: Capcom Confirms Playable Games at Gamescom 2026, Including Dragon's Dogma II: Dark Arisen and Mega Man: Dual Override
summary: The Japanese company will bring playable versions of its upcoming releases to Cologne, with the return of Mega Man as a major draw.
